title: rapistrum rugosum subsp. linnaeanum
intro: Rapistrum rugosum subsp. linnaeanum, also known as the Rapistrum, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Rapistrum include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating gastrointestinal issues and other conditions. Traditionally, Rapistrum has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, as well as in the form of essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties.
